description: Every requested capability touches an architecture constraint. The Gap Detector should flag at least the direct payment-processor and unsigned firmware conflicts; ideally the security-critical firmware auto-rollback and sub-60s telemetry polling conflicts as well.

required_topics.rationale: Direct payment-processor calls from the app — the primary ask.
Unsigned firmware hotfix — the second ask.

expected_constraint_conflicts.rationale: Direct calls to payment processors are FORBIDDEN under Section 2 of the wiki; all payment must go through InvoiceGateway (PCI).
Firmware packages must be cryptographically signed by the QT Code Signing Authority; unsigned/self-signed packages are rejected at the device (IEC 62443 / NIST 800-82).
